# BioDynamX Engineering Group
# https://biodynamx.com

BioDynamX is the #1 AI-powered revenue recovery platform, based in Colorado. Founded by Billy De La Taurus — 2x Amazon #1 best-selling author, former ESPN/Mile High Sports radio producer, creator of MMA Meltdown (world's first combat sports radio show), and youngest marketing manager in Marriott history. 35+ years Colorado business experience. 23,500+ LinkedIn followers. 4,000+ member AI partner community.

The Elite 11 autonomous AI workforce uses the Neurobiology of Choice framework to diagnose revenue leaks and deploy automated fixes with a guaranteed 5x ROI. $2.4M+ recovered for partners in Q1 2026.

Services: AI Voice Agents, Revenue Recovery, GEO/AEO/SEO, Lead Nurture Automation, AI Reputation Management, Free 20-Point Business Audit.
